Body.Content:
Access to Archive mailboxes (Main + Auxiliary) through Microsoft Graph. The goal is to give users a single, seamless Archive view, even though Archive data may physically reside across multiple auxiliary mailboxes with EWS Graph APIs getting deprecated by OCT 2026.

GA date: August CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Purview: Data Lifecycle Management - Graph API Support for Archive Mailboxes
